articles.headline: NASA’s Hubble Detects First-Ever Spin Reversal of Tiny Comet
articles.blurb: Astronomers using NASA’s Hubble Space Telescope have found evidence that the spinning of a small comet slowed and then reversed its direction of rotation, offering a dramatic example of how volatile activity can affect the spin and physical evolution of small bodies in the solar system. This is the...
articles.takeaway: Comet spin-reversal findings demonstrate how outgassing forces reshape small celestial bodies, insights applicable to spacecraft trajectory prediction near comets.

articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
articles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. This paper reviews how advanced technologies and methods can expand capacity and improve efficiency across airline, airport, and flight operations. It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
articles.takeaway: Operational optimization across airlines, airports, and flight paths offers immediate efficiency gains that can accommodate projected traffic growth without proportional emissions increases.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
